allow: Bash(nvim --headless -u tests/init.lua -c "lua require\('plenary.test_harness'\).test_directory\('tests/', { minimal_init = 'tests/init.lua', sequential = true, filter = 'runner' }\)")

Bash(nvim --headless --noplugin -n -u NONE --cmd 'lua package.path = "/Users/Dev/.config/nvim/pack/plugins/opt/tomltools.nvim/lua/?.lua;" .. package.path' --cmd 'lua local d = require\("tomltools.toml.decoder"\); local r = d.decode\("name = \\"test\\"\\n[section]\\nvalue = 42\\n"\); print\("ok="..tostring\(r.ok\).." name="..tostring\(r.data.name\).." section.value="..tostring\(r.data.section.value\)\); vim.cmd\("quit"\)')

Bash(nvim --headless --noplugin -n -u NONE --cmd 'lua package.path = "/Users/Dev/.config/nvim/pack/plugins/opt/tomltools.nvim/lua/?.lua;" .. package.path' --cmd 'lua local e = require\("tomltools.toml.encoder"\); local t = {name="hello", count=42, tags={"a","b"}}; print\(e.encode\(t\)\); vim.cmd\("quit"\)')
